commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1cf4a5fe7e72fcba8a7b8a3ced302a582eb00beb)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Claude assistant-message fallback parsing in `createCliJsonlStreamingParser` and tests incremental assistant partials, stream_event deduplication, backend filtering, and tool-use-only content.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +135. Total +185 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Partly: the linked issue has detailed logs and current source confirms only `stream_event/content_block_delta/text_delta` produces deltas, but this review did not establish a live current-main claude-cli reproduction or raw payload sample.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor handling because the blocker is raw live CLI evidence, a dirty merge state, and choosing the correct parser contract rather than a mechanical local repair.

target.title: fix: relay Claude CLI assistant partial messages as streaming deltas
target.body:
## Summary

The CLI JSONL streaming parser (`createCliJsonlStreamingParser`) only recognized `stream_event` events with `content_block_delta`/`text_delta` payloads. Claude CLI with `--include-partial-messages` (always enabled for the claude-cli backend) also emits `{"type":"assistant","message":{...}}` events carrying the accumulated text. When the CLI suppresses or omits raw `stream_event` lines in favor of these partial messages, zero streaming deltas reached the gateway, leaving WebChat and TUI surfaces without any progress until the turn closed.

Adds `parseClaudeCliPartialAssistantDelta` that extracts text from `assistant` partial messages and computes the delta against the previously accumulated text. When both `stream_event` deltas and `assistant` partials arrive for the same text, the partials are naturally deduplicated because the accumulated length has already advanced.

Closes #86050

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway streams zero claude-cli assistant deltas to WebChat/TUI during turns; surfaces only render the final assembled message after the turn closes.

Real environment tested: Reproduced the zero-delta condition by replaying real Claude CLI JSONL payloads (assistant partial messages, stream_event deltas, mixed text/tool_use content, and result events) through the actual streaming parser.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-output.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-backends.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix: 158 cases pass across the three files. Five new reproductions exercise the assistant partial message path: basic delta extraction from accumulated text, incremental delta computation across multiple partials, deduplication when both stream_event and assistant events carry the same text, filtering of non-Claude backends, and text extraction from mixed text/tool_use content blocks.

Observed result after fix: The streaming parser produces onAssistantDelta callbacks for both stream_event text_delta events and assistant partial message events. The gateway relay code forwards these as chat state:delta WebSocket messages without changes.

What was not tested: Live Claude CLI subprocess with real Anthropic API credentials.
target.author: sebtardif
